name: Sambuca Romana Jam
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the sugar and pectin together.
2. Stir into blueberries, lemon rind, and water in a heavy saucepan with Sambuca.
3. Cook over high heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture reaches a hard boil.
4. Add the remaining sugar to the mixture and continue boiling until it reaches a rolling boil.
5. Boil for 1 minute after reaching a rolling boil.
6. Remove from heat and skim off foam with a metal spoon using tongs or a jar lifter.
7. Place 10 coffee beans in each sterilized, hot jar.
8. Immediately pour the jam into the jars and seal them vacuum-style.
9. Makes 5 one-and-a-half pint jars.
